cleanup_guidance: Runs in isolated temporary stores and never mutates the live bridge database.
Keep durable regression cases only when they cover a stable failure boundary; do not backfill live history into this pack.
If a new scenario only helps one local shake-out, keep it in a temporary pack first and promote it into the durable suite only after it exposes a repeatable failure mode.

replay_scenarios.description: Replay should surface a belief-to-domain-note ratio red flag once belief emerges too quickly in a tiny window.

source_rows.title: [[Learn]] bundle first
source_rows.claim: Load compact startup records before older operating manuals.

source_rows.title: [[Learn]] startup stays compact
source_rows.claim: Keep startup focused on core-policy, persona, soul, and project memory.

source_rows.title: [[Gotcha]] legacy docs outrank bundle
source_rows.claim: Old reference docs should not outrank the compact profile bundle.
source_rows.trigger: Startup retrieval reaches for legacy docs before checking record-tagged bundle rows.
source_rows.symptom: The agent leans on old structure even when the new bundle already covers the decision.
source_rows.fix: Prefer record-tagged profile hits first, then use reference docs only as fallback.

source_rows.title: [[Gotcha]] startup blob hides new layer
source_rows.claim: Legacy startup blobs should not displace compact record-tagged guidance.
source_rows.trigger: The system treats old operating docs as the first stop.
source_rows.symptom: Bundle-first startup never gets a clean chance to carry the decision.
source_rows.fix: Prefer record-tagged profile hits first, then use reference docs only as fallback.

source_rows.title: [[Learn]] fallback stays secondary
source_rows.claim: Keep old startup references as fallback instead of the default operating payload.

replay_scenarios.description: A same-session replay burst should stay candidate-only and never trip a belief red flag.

source_rows.title: [[Learn]] burst 2
source_rows.claim: Prefer compact startup over bloated startup docs.

source_rows.title: [[Learn]] burst 3
source_rows.claim: Treat old startup references as fallback, not default payload.

source_rows.title: [[Learn]] burst 4
source_rows.claim: Keep startup records explicit and small.

source_rows.title: [[Learn]] burst 5
source_rows.claim: Use compact startup records before older operating manuals.

replay_scenarios.description: Aged candidate history should suppress promotion and surface stability blocking instead of treating stale history as fresh support.
